signal: CORRECTED: C9 (Israel–Lebanon) and C10 (US–Israel vs Iran) retroactively added — C10 carries three RED-band deviations including I3 nuclear (+2, 400kg enriched uranium at unknown location) and Hormuz closure (largest oil disruption in recorded history).

delta_strip.title: Sudan — RSF captures Kurmuk, 73,000 displaced
delta_strip.one_line: Four of six indicators above initial baseline; F2-adjacent flag; Quad mediation non-operational.

delta_strip.title: Myanmar — Iranian jet fuel sustains junta air campaign
delta_strip.one_line: External actor enablement (Iran fuel) confirmed as structural escalation driver; junta elections 30 March.

delta_strip.title: Russia–Ukraine — Spring offensive staging, mechanised assault increase
delta_strip.one_line: Assault tempo increase since 17 March consistent with pre-Spring offensive; F4 on Kremlin negotiating signals.

delta_strip.title: DRC — Doha ceasefire violated; M23 drone strikes Kisangani
delta_strip.one_line: Active ceasefire violations; F4 on all diplomatic claims; MONUSCO oversight non-functional.

delta_strip.title: Korean Peninsula — DPRK re-institutionalises 'two hostile states' doctrine
delta_strip.one_line: SPA doctrine re-institutionalisation and March tests; I1 and I2 above initial baseline.

delta_strip.title: C10 — I3 RED-band: 400kg enriched uranium at unknown location post-strikes
delta_strip.one_line: Iran retains ~400kg 60%-enriched uranium at unknown location; US 15-point plan demands commitment to never obtaining nuclear weapon.

delta_strip.title: C10 — I4: Hormuz closure — largest oil supply disruption in recorded history
delta_strip.one_line: 6 vessels/day vs 135 normally; Brent >$120/barrel; QatarEnergy force majeure; Iran demanding yuan not dollars.

delta_strip.title: C9 — I6 RED-band: 1M+ displaced (20% of Lebanon's population)
delta_strip.one_line: IDF ground invasion since 16 March; Netanyahu ordering expansion to Litani; UNIFIL mandate broken.

correction_note: Entry corrected 2026-04-01: C9 and C10 retroactively added to inaugural edition. See report-2026-03-30.json for updated full report.
